description: Canonical Docker image registry for Sentinel Nexus. Single source of truth consumed by all preparation scripts, scan tooling, and offline loaders.

runtime_images.name: traefik
runtime_images.notes: Edge proxy -- internet-facing and internal routing

runtime_images.name: postgres
runtime_images.notes: Authentik SSO database (ephemeral tmpfs in production)

runtime_images.name: authentik
runtime_images.notes: Zero-trust SSO/IdP. Pin digest before air-gap bundle.

runtime_images.name: minio-tests
runtime_images.notes: Dev cluster object storage. Pin digest before air-gap bundle.

runtime_images.name: prometheus
runtime_images.notes: Metrics collection. Pin digest before air-gap bundle.

runtime_images.name: grafana
runtime_images.notes: Metrics visualization. Pin digest before air-gap bundle.

runtime_images.name: opencti-connector-import-stix
runtime_images.notes: STIX 2.x bundle ingest -- primary offline TI import path

runtime_images.name: alpine-edge
runtime_images.notes: RSA key generator one-shot init container

build_base_images.name: rust-builder
build_base_images.notes: Base for all Rust service builds (7 Dockerfiles)

build_base_images.name: debian-runtime
build_base_images.notes: Intermediate stage in multi-stage Rust builds

build_base_images.name: distroless-static
build_base_images.notes: Final runtime layer for statically linked Rust binaries

build_base_images.name: distroless-cc
build_base_images.notes: Final runtime layer for Rust binaries with C stdlib

build_base_images.name: python-builder
build_base_images.notes: LLM Hunter / nexus_hunter Python agent environment

build_base_images.name: n8n-base
build_base_images.notes: Base for custom n8n image (adds openssh + python3). Pin digest before air-gap bundle.

build_base_images.name: distroless-base
build_base_images.notes: Final runtime layer for Redis and HAProxy custom builds

build_base_images.name: golang-builder
build_base_images.notes: Build base for custom NATS server Dockerfile

build_base_images.name: alpine-scanner
build_base_images.notes: Base for Anchore scanner build (syft + grype)

custom_images._comment: RUST SERVICES -- build_context MUST be '.' (repo root) so that 'COPY . .' in each
custom_images._comment2: Dockerfile captures the workspace-level Cargo.toml and Cargo.lock. Without the
custom_images._comment3: workspace root, 'cargo build -p <service>' fails: '{ workspace = true }' deps have
custom_images._comment4: no resolution target. Use 'dockerfile' to point at the service-specific Dockerfile.

custom_images.name: nexus-ingress
custom_images.notes: Axum Zero-Trust Gateway with HMAC/temporal/sequence integrity

custom_images.name: nexus-worker-qdrant
custom_images.notes: Telemetry → vector space mapper (Layer 1 Math Tripwires)

custom_images.name: nexus-worker-s3-archive
custom_images.notes: Parquet cold storage archiver with Hive partitioning

custom_images.name: nexus-worker-soar
custom_images.notes: SOAR containment action executor via n8n webhooks

custom_images.name: nexus-worker-rlhf
custom_images.notes: RLHF gold-label Parquet spooler for DPO training

custom_images._comment: PYTHON / NODE SERVICES -- context is the service directory (no workspace needed)

custom_images.name: nexus-hunter
custom_images.notes: LLM Hunter agentic swarm orchestrator. NEXUS_EMBED_MODEL baked at build time for air-gap.

custom_images.name: nexus-n8n
custom_images.notes: Custom n8n: adds openssh-client + python3 + AWS/Azure/GCP CLIs. ALL internet downloads happen at build time on the online machine.

custom_images.name: nexus-looking-glass
custom_images.notes: SvelteKit operator HUD frontend. npm ci runs during build -- no npm at runtime.

custom_images.name: nexus-mlops
custom_images.notes: MLOps training + inference runtime (all 4 Podman Quadlets). pip install runs at build; PyTorch + vLLM baked in.

custom_images._comment: INFRASTRUCTURE IMAGES -- custom-built for hardened distroless runtime.
custom_images._comment2: These were previously listed only as 'base images' (upstream tags) in runtime_images,
custom_images._comment3: meaning production deployed the upstream image, not the hardened custom build.
custom_images._comment4: Now built in Phase 2 alongside service images so offline targets load one canonical tag.

custom_images.name: nexus-nats
custom_images.notes: Custom NATS server v2.10.14 compiled from source in Go, deployed on distroless/static. Pins exact server version for qdrant-client compatibility validation.

custom_images.name: nexus-qdrant
custom_images.notes: Qdrant vector DB compiled from source with jemalloc. QDRANT_VERSION ARG pins the git tag for reproducibility. Must be compatible with qdrant-client crate version in Cargo.lock.

custom_images.name: nexus-haproxy
custom_images.notes: HAProxy extracted from haproxy:3.0-bookworm and repackaged on distroless/base for minimal attack surface.

custom_images.name: nexus-redis
custom_images.notes: Redis extracted from debian:bookworm-slim and repackaged on distroless/base. jemalloc + TLS libs included.
